character.description: 6-year-old boy, olive skin, curly dark brown hair, green eyes, wearing a red striped shirt, blue shorts, and brown leather sandals
character.name: TestChild

style: soft watercolor children's book illustration, warm lighting, gentle shadows, storybook style, muted earthy palette
negative_prompt: photorealistic, scary, dark, blurry, deformed hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, multiple children
composition_rules: full body, centered subject, clean uncluttered background, consistent framing, face clearly visible
character_sheet_prompts: front-facing portrait, neutral expression, plain cream background
three-quarter view, slight smile, plain cream background
side profile, neutral expression, plain cream background

scenes.action: standing at the edge of a forest, looking curious
kneeling to pet a small brown rabbit on a mossy path
walking through tall golden grass holding a wooden stick
looking up at an enormous oak tree with wonder
sitting on a large rock reading a folded paper map
crossing a small wooden bridge over a gentle stream
gently helping a small bird back into its nest
running through a sunlit clearing laughing with arms open
crouching to watch fireflies at dusk, hands cupped
sitting by a small campfire, smiling, warm glow on face
walking along a path home under a starry night sky
sleeping peacefully in a cozy bed, soft moonlight through window
